atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain as constant.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain started approximately three weeks ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain is worsening with activity.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left hand pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in their shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states acetaminophen provides partial relief.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Examination reveals tenderness of the greater tuberosity of the humerus.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has no tenderness at the sternoclavicular or acromioclavicular joints.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has limited active and passive range of motion.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinical presentation is most consistent with rotator cuff tendinopathy.
